name: yuumi
description: Yuumi workflow skills for editing, explaining, implementation notes, interviews, and polished HTML artifacts.

interface.longDescription: Yuumi bundles practical cross-agent workflow skills for spatial editing, plan interviews, code explanation, implementation decision logs, guided teach-me learning sessions, and polished Anthropic-style HTML artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Use Yuumi to make this easier to understand.
